jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Aptech - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
